entry.title: Re: Build Apps - 500 Error
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-builders-blog-posts/what-s-new-for-sap-build-apps-enhanced-fusion-development/ba-p/13591981 This should resolve. "If you currently have an SAP Build Apps project deployed to SAP Build Work Zone, you should not encounter any issues. However, once you update your app, create a new build and deploy it to your SAP Build Work Zone page you will notice that access to the app will not work. Note: All SAP Build Apps users must make the changes described below before you deploy and integrate a new app version to SAP Build Work Zone, otherwise you risk losing access to your projects. "

entry.title: Re: Defaulting Due By Date in Service Requests (SMRQ) - S...
entry.content: To set a default "Due By" date as +5 days from the current date during Service Request creation in an SAP environment, you would typically use the SAP Project Reference Object (SPRO) to configure this. In SPRO, navigate through the Implementation Guide (IMG) to find the module relevant to Service Requests (likely under Customer Service, Plant Maintenance, or CRM). You might need to adjust date calculation settings or implement a custom solution using user exits or BAdIs with ABAP coding. There's no direct path in SPRO as it varies by the specific SAP module and version, so you'll need to explore the relevant module configurations or consult with an ABAP developer for a custom-coded solution. Always test changes in a non-production environment first.

entry.title: Re: SAP hana_ml ARIMAX with SAP AI Core
entry.content:
Hello, These blogs have examples on using hana_ml in AI Core, for scheduling and inference via REST-APi

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-ai-core-scheduling-sap-hana-machine-learning/ba-p/13577484

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-ai-core-realtime-inference-with-sap-hana-machine-learning/ba-p/13578035

entry.title: SAP BTP Cockpit Developer Account
entry.content:
Hello, I created an account to create SAP Build App via SAP BTP Cockpit.
As an admin, I can log in to the Lobby section, but I open accounts for other people to make developments, but they cannot log in to the Lobby section.
I looked at the documentation on this issue, but I couldn't figure it out. Can you help me?
Thanks

My screenshots are as follows.

SAP BTP Cockpit

SAP BTP Cockpit

 

 

 

 

 

SAP BTP Cockpit - Subaccount
SAP BTP Cockpit Subaccounts

 

 

 

 

 

 

SAP BTP Lobby

Build Lobby Login Page

entry.content: Hcm payroll

entry.title: Re: Automated Emails when Service Request is Assigned to...
entry.content:
Hi dvan1,

I would recommend following below KBAs to configure your email actions/conditions for SMRQ, but it's recommended to copy standard SMRQ to your own transaction type like ZMRQ to do the changes:
2434880 - How to configure email notifications in ChaRM and ITSM - Solution Manager
3103731 - How to work with Action Definition and Action Conditions
Following above instructions to do necessary changes for the email notification configurations.
Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Please tell me about Reset Transaction Data.
entry.content:
Hi,

 

can you explain in more detail what exactly you mean with the term "transaction data can be deleted by using the application in the subject line".

 

Do you have bank statement items which were posted and you ask if these are reset using the application Reset Transaction Data?

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

We have a header condition type ZPR1 which can aggregate all the items values of TANN, now we are copying that value into ZPMO manually. Our expectation is it will update automatically in the condition type ZPMO. How can we achieve this? Please see the below screenshot:

Thanks 
Abul Hasnat

entry.title: Re: SAP ANALYTICS CLOUD: Text in the Axis lable is not fu...
entry.content:
Hi @former_member749303,

if the label is truncated, you can drag the line of axis to get the label expanded.

the data will be expanded.

entry.title: Link to external url in sac table
entry.content:
Dear all,

we have a SAC story with detailed document number (each row is related to one document number). We would like to click on a link that open a pdf document showing the invoice related to the document number. 
what would be the best way to achieve that ?

i know that it is not possible to have image in cell.  We know to pass parameters to run external url but we are looking for the best way to display a clickable link. 
thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Script to another table - Sap Analytic cloud
entry.content:
Hello Daniel,

to be honest, I don't understand your description, what you want to do...

I recommend you start with an easy example, and from there you can go on:

https://help.sap.com/doc/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/2022.12/en-us/b9b58a72342845cd91c14fd2c2b9a06c.html

FYI: There is also 1 Open SAP Course regarding Analytics Designer... I think "SAC3" it was, if I remember right.

BR, Martin

Shashi

entry.title: Re: how to read all operations from memory in IW32
entry.content: I use function CO_BT_AFVG_GET_ALL

entry.title: Re: Field in RFC Response not being populated although it is in Message Mapping
entry.content:
Did you solve this ?

I tried:

- clearing all caches including full CPA cache refresh

- make a dummy change in the rfc channel and reactivate

- re activated the function module in backend and re imported it in PO

- restart "XPI Adapter: RFC" service using NWA

- I debugged the call in SAP and the value gets populated, but when it arrives in PO it is empty

entry.title: Re: Field in RFC Response not being populated although it is in Message Mapping
entry.content: Sorry double entry, but I can't delete it

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Washington DC

entry.title: Re: A Quick Guide To ABAP Debugger
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing this quick guide to ABAP Debugger! It's always great to come across resources that help simplify complex processes like debugging. ABAP Debugger can be quite powerful but navigating through it efficiently can sometimes be a challenge. Your guide seems like a handy reference for both beginners and experienced developers alike.

I particularly appreciate the step-by-step breakdown you've provided. Clear instructions make it much easier to follow along and apply the concepts in real-world scenarios. Do you have any additional tips or tricks for maximizing productivity with ABAP Debugger? I'm sure many of us would benefit from your insights.

Looking forward to more valuable content from you!

entry.title: How to start multiple hybirs locally.
entry.content:
Dear teams.

I would like to hear about local hybris.
I'm trying to start a local server in a thin client environment, but the following error occurs due to the structure of the thin client environment.

・Address already in use: bind

The way a thin client works is that one Windows is shared by multiple people.
Since one Windows is shared by multiple people, I think that when each person tries to start hybris, they cannot start it because the port is already in use.
I think this can be avoided if the person sharing the windows can change the port number used by hybris. Is there a way to change the local hybris port number?
Or if there is any other workaround, could you please let me know?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to start multiple hybirs locally.
entry.content: You may change the port in the correct file.

entry.title: Re: gCTS is still here
entry.content:
Hi,
sorry, me again... to avoid misunderstandings: the sentence 'Currently only BTP ABAP environment is integrated with cTMS to make use of transport landscapes.' is about ABAP systems and their integration in cTMS. cTMS does not support ABAP Development in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public and Private edition or on-premise.

Kind regards

Karin

entry.title: Re: Order qunatity filed is blank
entry.content:
Hi,

It was unchecked, now i given tick mark. it is  working fine thank you so much for your quick response.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Oracle to Sybase Migration - Agreement upgrade and Cost for Sybase agreement
entry.content: We have migrated from Oracle to Sybase, what is the procedure to migrate our contract? And is a fee applicable for this?

entry.title: BAPI_USER_CHANGE not work under CUA environment
entry.content:
Hello SAP

We are trying to change user password by FM( BAPI_USER_CHANGE ).  Our SAP system is running on CUA environment. Central system is Client( 100 ) of Development Server. We have checked restrictions of this FM under CUA.  No special restriction were found. 

I thought changing initial password will lead changing password of users on child system. Changing anohter item like first name & last name will lead to changing those of user on child system. However nothing happened as we expected. So we didn't specified target child system. I attach our test senario. By the way, excel file cannot uploaded ? 

Why anything happen ? Is ther any restriction for Functional Module under CUA environment ?

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: How can I use PMR with more than one storage locations?
entry.content:
Hi,

yes, a control cycle for advanced production integration does not allow a different storage location. You need to set this up using one storage location and then set up the stock determination (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/98cdcb53ad377114e10000000a174cb4.html?locale=en-US&q=stock%20determination) in order to stage the product from another storage location.

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: How to display 3d pdf images in sap fiori and add a location marker inside that image?
entry.content:
I am working on a requirement where we need to display 3D Pdf images and also should be capable to add location markers inside it.
Could anyone guide or provide inputs on how we can achieve this in fiori?

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Thank you for the welcoming 😄

entry.title: About Using Text to Speech Feature in SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi All,

We tried using the text to speech feature in SAP Enable Now for See-It simulations, and it is working. In preview mode, we can hear the audio. However, when we publish the MP4 format, the audio is not getting generated / not audible. If we do SCORM it will work, but our deliverable is only in MP4 format.

Kindly help.

entry.title: Re: POSC after LOSC
entry.content: Usually it is possible, but in your description I do not see a Picking step ( if it is Outbound process ) . But you can customize it and test, if it wont work, ask again and provide a bit more details.

entry.title: Re: POSC after LOSC
entry.content:
Hi,

"  Is it possible to perform POSC after LOSC?"

Yes, of course, why not?

Well, technically the system will always first have to find the process. For each process step, LOSC might be found due to your layout settings. But this means that what you physically see is first the LOSC steps.

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Re: BAPI_USER_CHANGE not work under CUA environment
entry.content: I posted "Case". Please close this.

entry.title: Re: POSC after LOSC
entry.content: "Well, technically the system will always first have to find the process." I cannot fully agree wit this statement 🙂

entry.title: Re: Link to external url in sac table
entry.content: In your table external hyperlink settings you can click on the 'Show Hyperlinks in Table' option to make your document numbers clickable. Or as in this screenshot on Products:

I received the mail with the campaign code on February 23, 2024. Since then, I have been sending many emails and communicating with support, but I have not had any luck so far in resolving the problem.

help me plz iam afraid lose this free campain codee

entry.title: Re: Debugging custom logic using ADT in SAP S/4Hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Christina

we have a S4HC Public Cloud with a DEV & PROD tier.   I have adjusted my business user role to have unrestricted access to a role BR_DEVELOPER from the Role Template SAP_BR_DEVELOPER as per as per SAP Note 3259196  

But when I attempt from Eclipse ADT a New ABAP Cloud Project and specify the ABAP service instance for connecting to the cloud environment I still get the error below.  Any clues ?

The Browser opens and I enter in my email address to connect like I would normally do but then the message is shown in the Browser.

<exc:exception xmlns:exc="http://www.sap.com/abapxml/types/communicationframework">
<namespace id="com.sap.adt"/>
<type id="ExceptionResourceNoAuthorization"/>
<message lang="EN">No authorization to access the resource /sap/bc/adt/core/http/reentranceticket.</message>
<localizedMessage lang="EN">No authorization to access the resource /sap/bc/adt/core/http/reentranceticket.</localizedMessage>
<properties>
<entry key="T100KEY-ID">SADT_RESOURCE</entry>
<entry key="T100KEY-NO">003</entry>
<entry key="T100KEY-V2">/sap/bc/adt/core/http/reentranceticket</entry>
</properties>
</exc:exception>

entry.title: Calculated measures based on restricted measures
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, I am trying to create a variance measure based on a restricted measure. Inside my restricted measure I have a Version restriction.

(Restricted measure 1)

(Restricted Measure 2)

So I just want make a simple calculation but after I create the calculation It does not appear on the table and neither I have a popup error about anything.

(Calculated Measure)

I guess that the only reason that the measure is not appearing is the fact that I have separate Version restrictions.

Thank you in advance guys.

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Generator for VS Code - Adaptation Editor can not be opened
entry.content: Hi Julia, could you please

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration - How to Manage Abnormally Large Files with SFTP Adapter and SAP HANA Database
entry.content:
Thank you for sharing this insightful topic on managing abnormally large files with SFTP Adapter and SAP HANA Database for cloud integration. Handling large files can indeed pose significant challenges, especially when it comes to ensuring smooth data transfers and maintaining system performance.

Using SFTP Adapter in conjunction with SAP HANA Database sounds like a robust solution for managing such scenarios. It's essential to have reliable methods in place to handle these large files efficiently, ensuring data integrity and minimizing any potential disruptions in the integration process.

I'm particularly interested in learning more about the specific strategies or best practices you recommend for optimizing performance and mitigating potential bottlenecks when dealing with these large files. Any insights you can share would be greatly appreciated by the community.

entry.title: Re: CAP "schema_evolution": "auto" with SQLite does not w...
entry.content:
You can migrate to schema_evolution:auto with command cds deploy --model-only. You should do this before making changes to model that deviates from what is deployed.

See https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/databases-postgres#migration

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Generator for VS Code - Adaptation...
entry.content:
Hi Julia,

could you please add "debug: true" in your ui5.yaml. It should look like this:

- name: fiori-tools-preview 
  afterMiddleware: compression 
  configuration: 
   component: myapp 
   ui5Theme: sap_horizon 
   debug: true

afterwards please try to start the adaption editor again.

The file adaptation-editor.html is generated at runtime, so it does not need to be part of the webapp folder. The error code that you are getting indicates and issue with the backend

entry.title: Re: How to Use Fiori Element App in User task in BTP work...
entry.content:
Hi @appu24 

thank you for asking the question, we have the same requirement.

 

@Archana  / @Ivan-Mirisola:

Unfortunately, the tutorials do not describe how to integrate an existing Fiori Elements app.
They only show how to generate/design a UI5 "form".

Is it possible to integrate a Fiori Elements app as a workflow step/task?
If yes, is there an example/a tutorial?

Kind regards,
Alexander

entry.title: Re: About Asset Accounting, How to add my company code to...
entry.content: The reason has finally been identified - it stems from an issue of authority.

entry.title: RAP V4+Flexible Programming Model macro Table editable
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have RAP managed with draft  OData V 4. I created an app in VS Code. I want to have editable table in my list report. I use sap.fe.macros.Table. 

 
When I tried to preview my app, the table can´t be edited:
 
When I open object page and press edit button, the table is then in then in edit mode:
 
Opening object page with edit mode causes some issues by editing. How can I start with the table in edit mode without opening object page / detail page?
please help.
thank you.
Jarda

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano 

I am a newbie, I graduated in Accounting and I have had a few years working as an accountant but things are getting harder in my field. That was when I discovered SAP and want to pursue the career of a SAP FICO Consultant. I feel very lucky that I found this post.

 I identify myself with the following categories:

  • Women
  • Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic location

Thank you so much!

entry.title: Re: Why data type used for private attribute should be de...
entry.content: Please do not post a solution for commenting the question. Use the link "Show replies" below the question and then "Comment".

entry.title: Re: Seeking Advice: Bridging Experience Gap for Role as a SAP CPI Consultant
entry.content: Thank you for the resource links!!!

entry.title: Re: Why data type used for private attribute should be defined in class-relevant local definition?
entry.content: By "silly", I wanted to say that the question is asking "why is sky not blue" although sky is blue. Private attributes can be defined in any class, even test classes (although I don't understand why you need to define types in test classes, I think of situations where I could possibly need types for defining a short list of columns to compare but instead I'm using constructor expressions).

entry.title: change company name & address

my company has change name and address.

so i want to change that for all users in system

SAP Support

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 2

entry.title: Function Location Label showing different then created
Re: Secure your LLM: Consuming SAP Generative AI deployments in a Simple Python App
entry.content: This sounds like a promising approach to ensuring the security of LLM deployments while simplifying integration into Python applications. For those interested in enhancing their AI capabilities securely, I recommend considering SpringsApps for AI chatbot development. Their expertise in AI solutions could be invaluable for implementing SAP Generative AI deployments effectively.

entry.title: How to extract the Deleted Comments in Goal Section from Performance Form
entry.content: How to extract the Deleted Comments in Goal Section from Performance Form

entry.title: Eclipse - Add Software- PKIX path error due to certificate missing in JRE std trust store
entry.content:
Hello Eclipsers out there, 
right after installing and opening Eclipse 2023-12, I wanted to add the SAP tools via Menu/Help/Install new software....using work with URL: https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/2023-12

I got a popup with the error  "Unable to read repository at   https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/2023-12/content.xml    "

With details in the error log: 

PKIX path building failed: sun.security.provider.certpath.SunCertPathBuilderException: unable to find valid certification path to requested target

Although I finally found an easy one, I would be interested in your approaches to fix it. I will share after some comments.

And if anyone knows where the SCN Wiki  (https://wiki.scn.sap.com/wiki/display/SAPHCP/SAP+Development+Tools+for+Eclipse+Installation%3A+FAQ+and+Known+Issues) is gone, which they still have on  https://tools.hana.ondemand.com/2023-12/ 

They just reroute to the start page of the new community.

Regs
Ulf

entry.title: Re: Please help guide me
entry.content:
You mention school system. If your experience is in education then have you considered the training aspect?

In my experience many of the people who give training / prepare training material don't have the education background. While their knowledge, training material and presentation is often excellent, it doesn't necessarily take into consideration the different ways, different people learn.

What I am thinking is "train the trainer".

Good luck with the career change.

Gavin

entry.title: Re: Function Location Label showing different then created
entry.content: Please guide to display the actual created label

entry.title: Wht is the reason for payment block if we done GR after the invoice ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have done an invoice for PO without GR. The invoice is now blocked for payment.

After that, we did GR for the same PO line item. 

1. After doing the GR, the payment block for the invoice will be reverted, right? Still, the invoice is displaying as payment for block. What would be the reason for blocking the invoice for payment?

The quantity invoiced and Gr have the same amount as well, but the invoice is blocked for payment?

2. When we checked the document workflow, GR and IR documents were not mapped. How can we map the GR and IR documents? 

 

Regards,

Siva

Thanks for showing interest to host a CodeJam on SAP Build. I will provide you more details in the mail.

Best Regards,

Shilpa

Bastian

Runtime Version: 4.9.150

entry.title: Re: Employee Absence data from Infotype 2001

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS1: TM master data based Sales Order Scheduling
entry.content:
Hi @christoph_greil ,

Thanks for the feedback!

Yes, TM provides transit & loading times. And I know no plans to add further time. But it might be worth looking at the customizing of BPS. May be there's the chance to define a respective action and let the lead times being calculated somehow different than with the SD route.

Best regards,

Michael

entry.title: Re: Using SOAP API of "Create Billing Document- with SD Reference" to post data to S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi @sudarshan005 ,

If SOAP UI returns a status code of 202, it indicates that your request for a Billing Document has been successfully transmitted to S4Hana Cloud. However, to ascertain the current status of the request, please refer to the Message Monitoring (AIF) logs within S4Hana Cloud. If there are any data issues or missing dependencies, the billing document may not be created, and these specifics can be found in the AIF monitoring logs.

Kind regards, Vijay

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Generator for VS Code - Adaptation...
entry.content: Hi, what kind of backend do you have? What is the default authentication type of your backend?

entry.title: #SITBLR 2024: Implementing end-to-end use cases with SAP BTP and Hyperscalers
entry.content:
Still buzzing from the incredible experience at SAP Inside Track 2024! Taking the stage as a session speaker alongside my colleague @uma-anbazhagan was an absolute thrill ! The journey from preparing my presentation to delivering it in front of fellow enthusiasts was nothing short of exhilarating. In this blog post, I'm excited to share the highlights of my experience, from the technical insights shared during our session to the candid moments that made it a truly unforgettable occasion.
 
SAP Inside Track events serve as platforms for collaborative knowledge exchange within the SAP ecosystem. The day commenced with a keynote address by Sindhu Gangadharan, SVP & MD, SAP Labs India and Head User Enablement, whose insights illuminated the intricacies of the SAP ecosystem, setting a tone of inspiration for attendees. The emphasis was on active engagement, mutual learning, and leveraging collective expertise to drive innovation and success in SAP technology. 

This year's SAP Inside Track featured eight tracks, each covering a wide range of topics including SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), Application Development, Data Analytics, Artificial Intelligence & Automation, UI/UX Design, SAP Concur, and SAP S/4 HANA, providing attendees with a comprehensive exploration of key areas within the SAP landscape.  


Session on "Implementing end-to-end use cases with SAP BTP and Hyperscalers" 


Our session focused on showcasing some of the joint reference architectures developed by SAP and Hyperscalers that organizations can harness to drive innovation, scalability and efficiency in their business operations. 

In Frame Speakers: Swati and Uma

The session started with SAP’s multi-cloud strategy and the guiding principles and directions to get started with building interoperable SAP business applications, followed by the end-to-end use-cases developed as part of Joint-Reference Architecture collaboration of SAP and Hyperscalers like AWS, GCP and Microsoft Azure. We then delved into pivotal pillars such as Platform Foundation, Application Development, Integration, Data and Analytics, and Artificial Intelligence and talked about architecture in each of these pillars. 

Each of the reference architecture that was talked about leveraged complimenting services from both the platforms and gave an insight into how SAP and Hyperscalers are working together to achieve the best of both worlds. 

 

 

You can implement these scenarios yourself by following the step-by-step documentation provided for each of these use-cases built on SAP Discovery Center. Scan the QR code to try out the scenario now! 

End-to-end use cases in SAP Discovery Center

 

Conclusion: 

As I come to the end of my journey at SAP Inside Track 2024, I find myself in awe of the journey from being a volunteer last year to standing as a session speaker this year. It's been an exhilarating ride, marked by growth, collaboration, and countless moments of inspiration. Alongside my colleagues, who delivered exceptional sessions across various tracks, I've had the privilege of playing a part in this vibrant event. Reflecting on these experiences, I'm struck by the profound impact of community-driven initiatives like SAP Inside Track in fostering collaboration and driving innovation. Looking forward to contributing to more such events in the future! 😊

There are upcoming SAP Inside Track events getting planned, do join us and share your experiences and expertise by following SAP Community

 

Team PAA at #sitBLR'24

entry.title: Re: Visit start date auto reverted
entry.content:
Hi,

This seems a non-standard behaviour. To check if the issue is due to PDI, would you please try switching off PDI once to see whether the issue will be resolved after that?

If the issue is still happening, it is recommended to report a ticket to SAP to further check in the system.

Thank you!

Best Regards,
Molly

entry.title: Re: Etag and CID variable while adding behavior defintion to cds in CP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hello Andre,

then clicking on your links I get the message:

"You're not authorized to see this page."

Can you please check them?

With Kind Regards,

Paul

entry.title: Implementation SAP Note 10560
entry.content:
Dear all, in my new company the SAP note 10560 was implemented with the one line: 
tkomk-aland = t001-land1. 
However, this overwrites the manual insertion of the tax departure country in the sales order header data. The tax determination still takes the country of the company code. Does anybody implemented this differently?
Thx a lot & rgds Barbara

entry.title: Re: Reg : Omiting Zero's in ADOBE output
entry.content:
I had similar requirement where Amount field of form needed to print as space in case of 0.00 value. Below javascript code in initialize event worked properly for me. in my case form field GV_TOT_DED is bind to interface field GV_TOT_DED which is of type QBSHB. I did not change anything in pattern. On Form, type of field GV_TOT_DED is decimal field and no need to make it as text field.

Simply add this code.

var totded = xfa.resolveNode("data.SP_Page1.SP_Invoice_Items.SP_Footer.GV_TOT_DED").rawValue;
if(totded == "0.00")
{
xfa.resolveNode("data.SP_Page1.SP_Invoice_Items.SP_Footer.GV_TOT_DED").rawValue = "";
  }

entry.title: SES Budget Exceed Error
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I am getting an error while posting SE (ML81N) , there is no long text available for this error. It only shows the budget exceeded by amount x . I even cannot double click this to find out details about account assignment elements, as you can see below in the attached SS.

Please help.

entry.title: Re: Maximize Your Learning Success with Live Sessions
entry.content: Hi, I'm getting a response code 403 and "Unable to fetch classes for this live session." for all the sessions I check.

entry.title: Planned delivery time of purchase order in SAP ECC and APO
entry.content:
Hi,

We have the planned delivery time for each purchase order as below. It is the time of the transport and handling resources in APO to this purchase order. We wanted to have as 70 days between France and China. But I am not allowed to change the planned delivery time of this PO in SAP ECC because P10 / P50 are not align with the same data anymore in this case. SO, question: How can I change this delivery date in SAP APO to synchronize or align the planned delivery time in both ECC and APO system?

entry.title: Re: Adaptation Project Generator for VS Code - Adaptation...
entry.content: The system is a S4HANA On Premise 2023 and we use basic authentication with user and password.

entry.title: GET method is being called after POST method - SAP Gateway API with RFCs
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a new API with both GET_ENTITY and CREATE methods, mapped to two different RFC function modules. When I try to test the POST method to create a new entry, after the CREATE RFC, the GET_ENTITY RFC is being called. Because of which I'm not able to get the return messages from POST method.

May I know how can I correct this?

Thank you for your help.

Regards,

Kishore

entry.title: Re: Add icon to Action label in RAP
entry.content:
So this can be done after deployment in UI adaptations is that correct?

I haven't reached this point yet so I'm unsure where this fit as it only mentions XML or CAP changes.

entry.title: Re: Using SAP Fiori Icons as a custom web font in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Dear all,

we have discovered that not all icons are working for the new story. Does anyone have an idea, why some of the icons work and some not?

Thanks for your response.

Best, Jonas

entry.title: How to add 1 more option to the field Purpose of visit
entry.content:
Hi Team ,

I have Extension App from standard app "FIN_TR_CRE" which contains  Purpose of Visits.

How to add one more option to Purpose of Visit in oData Service . Please help me out to solve this.

Thanks & Regards,

Sravani G.

entry.title: OpenText VIM: How to implement a custom filter to delete certain E-Mail attachments?
entry.content:
For incoming invoices (via email) we want to delete all attachments which are unequal .pdf. The class and method which are responsible for this are:

  • /OTX/PF01_CL_REGISTER_MAIL
    - /OTX/PF01_IF_REGISTRATION~REGISTER
    - GET_ATTACHMENT

At the moment I consider to solve this via an implicit enhancement spot in the method GET_ATTACHMENT. 

Would this be the best solution or does the VIM module have any Business Rules, Customizing, BAdIs, etc. instead which would be more suitable for this kind of 'enhancement'? If yes can someone provide more insights?

System is running on S/4HANA2020 On-premise.

entry.title: Re: CPI IDoc processing EOIO
entry.content: Do you have a detailed solution for this?

entry.title: Using Database Tables created using RAP in Custom Fields
entry.content:
Hello,

We have created a Report Using RAP in SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud, we want to use the key field  from this report as a Value Help(F4) into a custom field on sales order screen. The Database table when view in "View Browser" is released for both "Key User" and "Cloud Development"

 

but when we go to create a "Custom Field Based on CDS" the respective view is not displayed. Even if we try creating a Custom CDS View this view is not available.

Thanks and Regards,

Ashish Talekar

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility @Expert

entry.title: BAPI_USER_CHANGE under CUA environment
entry.content:
Hello SAP

We are trying to change user password by FM( BAPI_USER_CHANGE ).  Our SAP system is running on CUA environment. We have checked restrictions of this FM under CUA.  No special restriction were found. 

I thought changing initial password will lead changing password of users on child system. Changing anohter item like first name & last name will lead to changing those of user on child system. However nothing happened as we expected. So we didn't specified target child system.

Why anything happen ? Is ther any restriction for Functional Module under CUA environment ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: BAPI_USER_CHANGE under CUA environment
entry.content:
Dear customer!

Please use the function module BAPI_USER_CLONE instead of BAPI_USER_CHANGE.
There are a few user BAPIs which are explicitly for the CUA usage.
You can check all our user BAPIs in transaction BAPI -> Basis Components -> Security -> USER


Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: How to use UDF values in FSM HTML report?
entry.content: Thanks so much!!! Yes, this is working.

entry.title: Re: How to use UDF values in FSM HTML report?
entry.content: Thanks so much!!! Yes, this is working. The column header I already figured out myself. If you add the description of the column header in each translation file, it works. So in my case I add an entry for the /translations/de.js and /translations.en.js. ("Mileage_Udf_Notes_L":"Notizen" this makes the column header description)

entry.title: How to develop on SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content:
When I started to read about S/4HANA, my first Google was "How to develop on S/4HANA". I could not find any easy guide on how to develop it on the "new world", should I use ABAP, or should I use CDS View? Why should I use BTP if I can develop a system on SAP? 

Explaining in a easy way some technical points

What is SAP BTP?
It is a Platform as a Service. It means that you have several services that you can subscribe to paying a fee. For example, Microsoft has Office365, MS Teams, and XBOX as services that you can subscribe to consume. You just need to select the services that you want to use and subscribe to them.
SAP BTP is the same, but you will have some other types of services like a HANA Database, a development workspace, a service to schedule jobs, etc

SAP Discovery Center - Services (cloud.sap)

Is my SAP S/4HANA part of SAP BTP?
No! The SAP S/4HANA or ECC is decoupled from SAP BTP. In addition, you can use SAP BTP services even without an SAP S/4HANA environment

What is SAP ABAP RAP?
SAP ABAP RAP dictates how you should develop CDS Views to be consumed by a Fiori App or an API.
One of the tools of ABAP RAP is the backend of a Fiori development.
For example, you create a Z table that needs to be filled by the user. To do that, you create some CDS Views to select data from the Z table and format the output as the user desires, for example, a report with a create button.
You create a Fiori app to display the data to your user, and when the user clicks on the create button, fills the form with the Z table fields, and then clicks on Save, you will receive the information filled in by the user and then you can validate, create a sequential number, save, etc

What is the SAP CAP?
SAP CAP stands for SAP Cloud Application Programming Model. It is the framework for developing applications on the SAP BTP. With SAP CAP you will be able to create tables using CDS, create HANA artifacts like a calculation view, expose the data from these artifacts using OData, and create the Fiori App that will consume them.
The backend can be developed using Node.JS, Java, and ABAP. So, as happens with SAP ABAP RAP, when the user clicks on Save to create a new entry on your HANA Cloud Database table, you can handle it on your Node.js/Java/ABAP, for example checking if required fields have been filled or a date is valid.

The Two approaches for new developments in SAP S/4HANA

Approach 1 - Keep the core clean - the recommended one

What does it mean?
Initially, even if the system did not involve any SAP Standard functionality, we would create the customer Z table, the module pool, and reports directly on the SAP. Why? The common response from CEOs whom I talked about was due to the complexity of maintaining different programming languages on different systems.

Now, SAP is actively suggesting that any new development that does not need the SAP runtime environment should be done on the SAP BTP (Side-by-Side extension), as SAP BTP is decoupled from SAP S/4HANA.
With this shift, we guarantee that we are not changing the SAP S/4HANA environment

Check the Extensibility options to choose the correct one

Practicing Clean Core Extensibility For SAP S/4HANA Cloud
Benefits of Keeping the Core Clean with SAP BTP - SAP Community

How to develop a Side-By-Side Extension

Naturally, it depends on the type of development that you are creating, but here are some guides

  • Do you need to create new database artifacts, like a new table (old Z tables)?
    If yes, so you will need to have a subscription for SAP HANA Cloud for it. Then, you can create your tables using CDS language 

     

  • Do you need to consume data from SAP S/4HANA?
    If yes, so you will need to have a subscription for SAP HANA Cloud for it. Then, you can create your tables using CDS language, like the example below
    Do you need to consume data from SAP S/4HANA?
    If yes, you can consume it by APIs or use the SAP S/4HANA Database as a remote source of your application.
    The latter option allows you to use SAP S/4HANA tables (please, use released views instead of the tables directly) in a calculation view (important to mention, Calculation Views are read-only!).
    Naturally, for anything transactional where you are doing Create/Update/Delete on your SAP S/4HANA instance, then absolutely you should only use the released OData services - get them from SAP Business Accelerator Hub
    For example, to create a Business Partner, you should call it on your SAP CAP service like the video below
    https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rWQFbXFEr1M

  • How do I create a report on SAP BTP?
    If you need SAP S/4HANA Standard Tables (MARA, MARC, VBRK, AUFK, etc) data, you can use the SAP S/4HANA Database as a remote source or consume the API like mentioned above.
    Then, you can use a Calculation View to select the data and prepare the output logic.
    Finally, you can expose the Calculation View to be consumed with Fiori Elements App developed on SAP CAP or create a Freestyle Fiori app
  • Why do I need to know Node.js, Java, ABAP Cloud?
    The backend side of SAP CAP developments is done with Node.js, Java, or ABAP Cloud.
    The ABAP works pretty much like ABAP RAP (and the others follow the same logic), so again, when the user clicks on Save, it will stop in your SAP CAP Node.js/Java/ABAP RAP handler

    For ABAPers that are not familiar with CDS Views, it works like a user exit for a standard transaction.
    When the user clicks on Save inside of VA01, for example, you have some spots to validate the Sales Order, save the Sales Order data in a Z table, or even trigger a workflow.

    From my latest tests, you can create a fantastic Fiori List Report with CRUD with the ability to do validations, create records for associations, and etc

     

For a Side-By-Side extensibility example, please check my personal project https://github.com/vhsouza/MyNewCAPLibrary

Approach 2 - The company does not have access to the SAP BTP

If your company does not have access to SAP BTP or just does not want to use it, you should consider the following

What is the problem of continuing to work with classic SAP ABAP? Why should I use CDS (Core Data Services)
SAP has created the Core Data Services (CDS View) language to work with SAP HANA. Instead of copying data from the database to the application server (like ABAP does), CDS does all the logic inside of the SAP HANA Database.
Naturally, it not only leverages SAP HANA performance but also prepares the output to be consumed by APIs and SAP Fiori apps
For the most part of SAP ALVs, it can be easily replaced by creating an SAP Fiori App using Fiori Elements annotations
If you need to perform transactional processing, use BOPF or RAP for it, considering the SAP Help below to use the correct technology according to your environment version
https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/fc4c71aa50014fd1b43721701471913d/289477a81eec4d4e84c0302fb6835035.html

So, I have a performance issue, is that all?
No, you are also losing the users' performance. Please, check the blog How-To Estimate ROI of Your SAP UX Project | LinkedIn to have a better understanding.
In summary, Fiori provides a better user experience, breaking large transactions into smaller applications, and making your team work better (not only faster)
In addition, just compare a simple SAP Gui Transaction with a Fiori App, and you will find several improvements in what we can do about UX

How do I develop a Fiori app on SAP S/4HANA?

  • Create a CDS view select the data and add the logic.
    Please, follow the guidelines and read about basic view, composite view, and consumption to use it properly.
    DO NOT create just one CDS view with joins from different standard tables and expose it.

  • Create the Fiori App (Fiori Elements or Freestyle) using VSCode.

  • Deploy it using inside of your SAP S/4HANA using the report /UI5/UI5_REPOSITORY_LOAD.
    To create a Fiori Tile on SAP Fiori Launchpad, you will need to create a semantic object.
    There are some other steps if you are in an earlier SAP version

  • Create the Fiori Tile, Catalog, and group using the transaction /UI2/FLPD_CUST

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi @Anacorrea - exactly what our community is all about - both learning and sharing! Great to have you here. You can also network and discuss! Why not take a look at some of our open interest groups and take part in some discussions there?
